title: calymenia hirsuta
intro: Calymenia hirsuta, also known as Bearberry or Uva-ursi, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to North America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its antiseptic and astringent properties, which make it effective in treating urinary tract infections, diarrhea, and sore throats. The health benefits of Calymenia hirsuta include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off bacterial and fungal infections, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
